sector: Apparel Design, Pattern Making & Fashion Technology

questions.question: Fashion mein 'trend' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Ek specific style jo ek samay mein popular ho
options.B: Hamesha ek hi tarah ke kapde pehenna

questions.explanation: Fashion 'trend' ka matlab hai ek specific style ya look jo ek particular time period mein popular hota hai.

questions.question: Design ke kaun se element se ek garment ko 'sleek' aur 'modern' look milta hai?

options.B: Line

questions.explanation: Straight aur clean lines garment ko sleek aur modern look dete hain. Lines design ke fundamental elements mein se ek hain.

questions.question: Ek garment mein 'balance' ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Design ke elements ko evenly distribute karna
options.C: Sirf ek hi color use karna

questions.explanation: Balance design principle ka ek hissa hai jahan garment ke elements (jaise color, texture, shape) ko visually evenly distribute kiya jata hai taaki woh stable aur pleasing lage.

questions.question: Haute Couture kahan se originate hua?

options.B: London

questions.explanation: Haute Couture, jo high-end fashion aur custom-fitted clothing ke liye jaana jata hai, Paris, France mein originate hua.

questions.question: Ek fashion designer apne inspiration board ko aur kya kehte hain?

options.B: Sketchpad

questions.explanation: Inspiration board ko 'Mood Board' bhi kehte hain, jahan designer apne collection ke concept aur theme ke liye images, fabric swatches, colours, aur text collect karte hain.

questions.question: Fashion mein 'silhouette' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Garment ki overall outer shape

questions.explanation: Silhouette ek garment ki overall outer shape ya outline ko refer karta hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa design principle garment ke various parts mein visual interest create karta hai?

options.B: Unity

questions.explanation: Emphasis design ke ek particular area ko highlight karke visual interest create karta hai, jaise ki ek statement collar ya unique embellishment.

questions.question: Basic color wheel mein primary colors kaun se hain?

options.B: Red, Yellow, Blue

questions.explanation: Primary colors Red, Yellow, aur Blue hote hain, jinhe mix karke doosre colors banaye jaate hain.

questions.question: Fashion cycle ke kis stage mein ek style apni peak popularity par hota hai?

options.B: Rise

questions.explanation: Fashion cycle ke Peak stage mein ek style sabse zyada popular aur widely accepted hota hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa design principle ek garment ke alag-alag parts ke size relationship ko refer karta hai?

options.B: Harmony

questions.explanation: Proportion design ke alag-alag parts, jaise collar size to bodice length, ke size relationship ko refer karta hai.

questions.question: Vintage fashion kis time period ke kapdon ko refer karta hai?

options.B: Kam se kam 20 saal purane kapde

questions.explanation: Vintage fashion usually kam se kam 20 saal purane kapdon ko refer karta hai, jo ek particular era ke style ko represent karte hain.

questions.question: Ek fashion designer ke liye 'target market' define karna kyun important hai?

options.A: Apne designs ko sabke liye banana
options.B: Apne customers ki needs aur preferences ko samajhne ke liye
options.C: Sirf expensive kapde banane ke liye
options.D: Dusre designers ko copy karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Target market define karne se designer apne potential customers ki needs, preferences aur lifestyle ko samajh paate hain, jisse woh relevant aur appealing designs bana sakte hain.

questions.question: Minimalist design approach mein kya focus hota hai?

options.B: Simple forms, clean lines aur functionality

questions.explanation: Minimalist design mein 'less is more' philosophy follow ki jaati hai, jismein simple forms, clean lines, neutral colors aur functionality par focus hota hai.

questions.question: Fashion mein 'upcycling' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Purane kapdon ko naye, better quality products mein convert karna

questions.explanation: Upcycling mein purane ya waste material ko naye, useful aur often higher-value products mein transform kiya jata hai, jaise purani jeans se naya bag banana.

questions.question: Kaun sa design principle garment ke overall visual flow aur movement ko create karta hai?

options.B: Rhythm

questions.explanation: Rhythm design elements ko repeat ya progress karke visual movement aur flow create karta hai, jaise pleats ki series ya gradient color scheme.

questions.question: Fashion mein 'Diffusion line' kya hoti hai?

options.B: Ek designer ki more affordable aur accessible line
options.C: Kapde jo sirf online bikte hain

questions.explanation: Diffusion line ek established designer ya fashion house ki secondary line hoti hai jo original brand se zyada affordable aur accessible hoti hai, taki broader audience tak pahunch sake.

questions.question: Ek fashion designer ke liye 'inspiration source' kya ho sakta hai?

options.B: Sirf doosre designers ke kapde

questions.explanation: Fashion designers ko nature, art, history, travel, culture, architecture, aur even daily life se inspiration mil sakti hai.

questions.question: Cotton kaun se type ka fiber hai?

options.B: Natural

questions.explanation: Cotton ek natural fiber hai jo cotton plant se milta hai.

questions.question: Polyester fabric ki ek main property kya hai?

options.B: Highly absorbent

questions.explanation: Polyester apni wrinkle-resistant property ke liye jaana jata hai, jisse yeh travel-friendly garments ke liye popular hai.

questions.question: Silk fiber kahan se milta hai?

options.B: Cotton plant

questions.explanation: Silk ek natural protein fiber hai jo silkworm ke cocoon se obtain hota hai.

questions.question: Weaving mein 'warp' threads kaun se hote hain?

options.B: Vertical threads

questions.explanation: Weaving mein warp threads loom par vertically set kiye jaate hain, jabki weft threads horizontally interlaced kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Kaun sa fabric apni warmth aur breathability ke liye jaana jata hai, aur winters mein popular hai?

options.B: Wool

questions.explanation: Wool apni excellent insulating properties aur breathability ke liye jaana jata hai, making it ideal for winter wear.

questions.question: Denim kis type ka weave hai?

options.B: Satin weave

questions.explanation: Denim ek sturdy cotton fabric hai jo twill weave se banta hai, jismein diagonal ribs dikhai dete hain.

questions.question: Fabric ki 'drape' property ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Fabric ka texture
options.C: Fabric ka body par fall aur flow

questions.explanation: Fabric ki 'drape' uski ability ko describe karti hai ki woh body par kaise fall aur flow karta hai, jaise soft drape ya stiff drape.

questions.question: Lycra (Spandex) ka main purpose kya hai?

options.B: Fabric mein stretch add karna

questions.explanation: Lycra ya Spandex ek highly elastic synthetic fiber hai jo fabrics mein stretch aur recovery provide karta hai.

questions.question: Knitted fabrics, woven fabrics se kaise different hote hain?

options.A: Knitted fabrics mein threads interlace hote hain
options.B: Knitted fabrics mein loops interlock hote hain
options.C: Knitted fabrics hamesha stiff hote hain
options.D: Knitted fabrics sirf natural fibers se bante hain

questions.explanation: Knitted fabrics mein yarn ke loops interlock hokar fabric banate hain, jabki woven fabrics mein threads ko perpendicular direction mein interlace kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa fabric natural fibers se banta hai aur apni breathability aur lightweight nature ke liye summers mein prefer kiya jata hai?

options.B: Leather

questions.explanation: Linen flax plant se banta hai aur apni cool, breathable aur absorbent properties ke liye summer wear mein popular hai.

questions.question: Fabric 'count' se kya pata chalta hai?

options.B: Fabric mein threads ki density per square inch

questions.explanation: Fabric count (ya thread count) ek square inch mein warp aur weft threads ki total number ko batata hai, jo fabric ki softness aur durability ko indicate karta hai.

questions.question: Rayon ko 'regenerated cellulose fiber' kyun kehte hain?

options.B: Yeh natural polymers (jaise wood pulp) se chemical process ke through banta hai
options.C: Yeh animal hair se banta hai

questions.explanation: Rayon ek man-made fiber hai jo natural cellulose (typically wood pulp) ko chemically process karke banaya jata hai, isliye ise regenerated cellulose fiber kehte hain.

questions.question: Fabric 'hand' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Fabric ki feel aur texture jab use touch karte hain

questions.explanation: Fabric 'hand' uski tactile properties ko describe karta hai, jaise softness, smoothness, crispness, warmth, jo use touch karne par feel hoti hain.

questions.question: Kaun sa fiber apni high strength aur abrasion resistance ke liye jaana jata hai, aur outdoor wear mein use hota hai?

options.B: Silk

questions.explanation: Nylon ek synthetic fiber hai jo apni high strength, durability aur abrasion resistance ke liye jaana jata hai, making it suitable for outdoor and active wear.

questions.question: Ek fabric ki 'grainline' kya define karti hai?

options.B: Warp threads ki direction

questions.explanation: Grainline fabric mein warp threads ki direction ko refer karti hai, jo fabric ki stability aur drape ke liye crucial hai jab pattern pieces cut kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Interfacing ka kya role hai garment construction mein?

options.B: Fabric ko support, shape aur stability provide karna

questions.explanation: Interfacing ek additional fabric layer hai jo collars, cuffs, waistbands jaise areas ko support, shape aur stability dene ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa fabric apni lustrous surface aur luxurious feel ke liye jaana jata hai, jo party wear mein use hota hai?

options.B: Jute

questions.explanation: Satin ek weave type hai jo apni smooth, shiny surface aur luxurious feel ke liye jaana jata hai, making it popular for evening wear aur lingerie.

questions.question: Fashion illustration mein 'croquis' kya hota hai?

options.B: Ek basic figure sketch jo fashion designs ke liye foundation ka kaam karta hai

questions.explanation: Croquis ek basic body outline ya figure sketch hota hai jise fashion designers apne garment designs ko illustrate karne ke liye base ke roop mein use karte hain.

questions.question: Fashion figure ko usually kitne head heights mein proportion kiya jata hai?

options.B: 7.5 heads

questions.explanation: Fashion illustration mein figures ko intentionally exaggerated proportions mein draw kiya jata hai, typically 9 se 10 head heights tak, taaki garments lambe aur graceful dikhen.

questions.question: Fashion drawing mein 'rendering' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Design mein color, texture aur shadows add karna

questions.explanation: Rendering ka matlab hai ek drawing mein color, texture, shading aur highlights add karke use more realistic aur visually appealing banana, jisse fabric ki feel dikhe.

questions.question: Ek fashion sketch mein 'garment details' kya hote hain?

options.B: Stitching lines, button placement, pleats, ruffles jaise features

questions.explanation: Garment details woh specific elements hote hain jo garment ko unique banate hain, jaise collars, cuffs, pockets, buttons, zippers, pleats, ruffles, etc.

questions.question: Kaun se drawing tool se sharp aur precise lines banai ja sakti hain?

options.B: Watercolors

questions.explanation: Fine-liner pens apni thin nib aur consistent ink flow ke karan sharp aur precise lines banane ke liye ideal hote hain, jo garment details ke liye useful hain.

questions.question: Fashion illustration mein 'flats' ya 'technical flats' kya hote hain?

options.B: Garment ke two-dimensional, detailed drawings, bina model ke

questions.explanation: Flats ya technical flats detailed, 2D drawings hote hain jo garment ko flat lay position mein dikhate hain, jismein stitching, seams, aur all design details clearly visible hote hain. Yeh production ke liye essential hain.

questions.question: Shading aur highlight ka use fashion illustration mein kyun kiya jata hai?

options.A: Drawing ko bada dikhane ke liye
options.B: Garment ko 3D look aur depth dene ke liye
options.C: Drawing ko purana dikhane ke liye
options.D: Sirf colors add karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Shading aur highlights light source ko mimic karte hain, jo garment ko 3D volume, depth aur realism dete hain.

questions.question: Ek fashion designer ke portfolio mein 'storyboard' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Ek collection ke concept, mood aur visual narrative ko present karna

questions.explanation: Storyboard ek visual presentation hai jo ek entire collection ke concept, mood, inspiration aur visual narrative ko sequence mein present karta hai, often with sketches, fabric swatches aur text.

questions.question: Fashion illustration mein 'texture' ko kaise depict karte hain?

options.B: Specific drawing techniques aur rendering styles se fabric ki surface quality dikha kar
options.C: Ek hi tarah ki lines use karke

questions.explanation: Texture ko depict karne ke liye different strokes, shading patterns, aur medium use kiye jaate hain taaki fabric ki roughness, smoothness, sheen ya fuzziness ko convey kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Aapko ek flowy silk dress draw karni hai. Kaun se strokes use karenge?

options.B: Hard, rigid lines

questions.explanation: Flowy fabrics jaise silk ko depict karne ke liye long, curvilinear aur flowing strokes use kiye jaate hain, jo uski drape aur movement ko capture karte hain.

questions.question: Fashion illustration mein 'model drawing' aur 'fashion figure drawing' mein kya difference hai?

options.B: Model drawing realistic proportions par focus karta hai, fashion figure drawing exaggerated proportions par
options.C: Model drawing sirf males ke liye hai
options.D: Fashion figure drawing sirf children ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Model drawing realistic human proportions par focus karta hai, jabki fashion figure drawing intentionally exaggerated proportions (lambe legs, chhota torso) use karta hai taaki kapde zyada stylish dikhen.

questions.question: Kaun sa medium fashion illustration mein vibrant aur smooth color blends ke liye best hai?

options.B: Charcoal

questions.explanation: Alcohol-based markers vibrant colors aur smooth, seamless blending provide karte hain, jo fashion illustrations mein fabric ki texture aur folds ko effectively render karne ke liye ideal hain.

questions.question: Ek garment sketch mein 'technical drawings' kyun important hote hain?

options.A: Sirf art gallery mein display ke liye
options.B: Garment ki precise construction details aur measurements communicate karne ke liye production team ko
options.C: Customer ko impress karne ke liye
options.D: Drawing ko mushkil banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Technical drawings (flats) garment production ke liye blueprint ka kaam karte hain, jismein detailed construction lines, stitching, hardware, aur measurements clearly indicate kiye jaate hain taaki garment accurately banaya ja sake.

questions.question: Jab aap ek stiff fabric jaise canvas draw kar rahe hain, toh folds kaise dikhaenge?

options.B: Sharp, angular folds

questions.explanation: Stiff fabrics ke folds sharp, angular aur structured hote hain, jo fabric ki rigidity ko reflect karte hain. Iske vipreet, soft fabrics ke folds rounded aur flowing hote hain.

questions.question: Fashion illustration mein 'line quality' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Lines ki thickness, darkness aur character, jo drawing mein emotion aur depth add karte hain

questions.explanation: Line quality refers to the varied thickness, darkness, and expressive character of lines, which can convey texture, movement, form, and emotion in a drawing.

questions.question: Fashion illustrations mein accessories (jaise bags, shoes) ko kyun include kiya jata hai?

options.A: Sirf drawing ko bharne ke liye
options.B: Outfit ko complete karne aur overall look ko enhance karne ke liye
options.C: Accessories ka separate collection dikhane ke liye
options.D: Drawing ko zyada complex banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Accessories ek outfit ko complete karte hain aur overall styling aur mood ko enhance karte hain, jisse collection ka complete vision dikhta hai.

questions.question: Apne design ko communicate karne ke liye fashion designer kis drawing style ko prefer karta hai jo quick aur expressive ho?

options.B: Sketching (quick, gestural drawings)

questions.explanation: Sketching, especially quick gestural sketches, designers ko apne ideas ko quickly aur expressively capture karne mein help karta hai, jo ideation phase ke liye perfect hai.

questions.question: Sewing machine mein thread ko fabric ke through push karne wala part kaun sa hai?

options.B: Needle

questions.explanation: Needle sewing machine ka woh part hai jo thread ko fabric ke through push karta hai aur stitch banata hai.

questions.question: Sewing machine mein fabric ko feed karne aur hold karne wala part kaun sa hai?

options.B: Feed dogs

questions.explanation: Feed dogs (teeth-like mechanism) fabric ko needle ke neeche se smoothly feed karte hain, jabki presser foot fabric ko hold karta hai.

questions.question: Basic garment construction mein 'seam allowance' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Fabric edge aur stitch line ke beech ka distance

questions.explanation: Seam allowance fabric edge aur seam line (jahan stitch kiya jayega) ke beech ka distance hota hai, usually 1/2 inch ya 5/8 inch.

questions.question: Kaun sa stitch do fabric pieces ko permanently join karne ke liye use hota hai?

options.B: Running stitch

questions.explanation: Backstitch ek strong aur permanent stitch hai jo hand sewing mein use hota hai, aur machine sewing mein bhi starting aur ending points ko secure karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Hemming ka main purpose kya hai?

options.B: Fabric edges ko finish karna aur unhe unravel hone se bachana

questions.explanation: Hemming garment ke bottom edges ko fold aur stitch karke finish karne ka process hai, jisse woh neat dikhen aur fray na hon.

questions.question: Kaun sa seam ek strong aur durable finish provide karta hai, jismein raw edges enclose ho jaate hain?

options.B: French seam

questions.explanation: French seam ek clean finish provide karta hai jismein raw edges garment ke andar enclose ho jaate hain, making it ideal for sheer fabrics aur high-quality garments.

questions.question: 'Right sides together' sewing instructions ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Fabric ke wrong sides ko face karte hue stitch karna
options.B: Fabric ke printed ya finished sides ko face karte hue stitch karna
options.C: Fabric ko ek hi direction mein rakh kar stitch karna
options.D: Sirf ek hi fabric layer stitch karna

questions.explanation: 'Right sides together' ka matlab hai ki fabric ke woh sides jo garment ke bahar dikhenge, unhe ek doosre ke saamne face karte hue stitch karna, taki seam allowance andar ki taraf rahe.

questions.question: Buttonhole banane ke liye kaun sa stitch use hota hai?

options.B: Zigzag stitch

questions.explanation: Buttonholes ko machine par special buttonhole foot aur zigzag ya satin stitch setting se banaya jata hai, ya hand se buttonhole stitch use karke.

questions.question: Ek garment mein 'darts' ka kya function hai?

options.B: Fabric ko body ke curves ke according shape dena

questions.explanation: Darts fabric mein wedges hote hain jinhe stitch karke flat fabric ko 3D shape diya jata hai, taaki woh body ke curves (bust, waist, hips) par fit ho sake.

questions.question: Fabric edges ko fray hone se bachane ke liye kaun si finishing technique use hoti hai?

options.B: Clipping

questions.explanation: Seam finishing techniques jaise zigzag stitch, overlock (serging), ya binding raw fabric edges ko seal karti hain aur unhe fray hone se rokti hain.

questions.question: Zipper attachment ke liye kaun sa presser foot use hota hai?

options.B: Zipper foot

questions.explanation: Zipper foot ka design special hota hai jo zipper teeth ke bahut paas stitch karne ki permission deta hai, jisse clean aur close attachment hota hai.

questions.question: Ek garment mein 'gathers' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Fabric ko ek chote area mein compress karke fullness create karna

questions.explanation: Gathers fabric ki length ko reduce karke fullness create karte hain, jaise ki sleeves ya skirts mein, jahan ek longer piece ko ek shorter piece se join kiya jata hai.

questions.question: 'Understitching' ka primary benefit kya hai?

options.B: Facing ya lining ko garment ke andar roll hone se rokna
options.D: Fabric ko shrink hone se bachana

questions.explanation: Understitching ek stitch hai jo facing ya lining ko seam allowance se attach karta hai, jisse facing garment ke andar ki taraf neatly roll ho jati hai aur bahar se dikhti nahi.

questions.question: Ek garment mein 'interfacing' kahan use hota hai?

options.B: Collars, cuffs, waistbands jaise areas mein stiffness aur support dene ke liye
options.D: Garment ki length badhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Interfacing ek additional fabric layer hai jo garment ke specific areas ko shape, support, aur stiffness dene ke liye use hota hai, jaise collars, cuffs, waistbands, plackets.

questions.question: Kaun sa stitch temporary hota hai aur baad mein remove kar diya jata hai?

options.B: Basting stitch

questions.explanation: Basting stitch ek temporary stitch hai jo fabric layers ko hold karne ya fitting check karne ke liye use hota hai, aur garment banne ke baad remove kar diya jata hai.

questions.question: Ek 'casing' ka kya function hai garment construction mein?

options.B: Ek tunnel banata hai jismein elastic ya drawstring pass ho sake

questions.explanation: Casing fabric ka ek folded channel hota hai jismein elastic, drawstring ya ribbon pass kiya jata hai, jaise ki waistbands ya sleeve hems mein.

questions.question: Pressing aur ironing mein kya difference hai?

options.A: Koi difference nahi hai, dono same hain
options.B: Pressing up aur down motion mein steam use karti hai, ironing back aur forth motion mein
options.C: Pressing sirf dry heat use karti hai
options.D: Ironing sirf delicate fabrics ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Pressing mein iron ko fabric par rakha jata hai, steam di jaati hai, aur phir uthaya jata hai, jisse seams flat hote hain. Ironing mein iron ko fabric par back aur forth slide kiya jata hai taaki wrinkles remove hon. Pressing garment construction ka crucial part hai.

questions.question: Pattern making mein 'pattern pieces' kya hote hain?

options.B: Fabric ke shapes jinhe cut karke garment banaya jata hai

questions.explanation: Pattern pieces paper templates hote hain jinhe fabric par place karke cut kiya jata hai, aur phir un cut pieces ko stitch karke garment banaya jata hai.

questions.question: 'Bodice block' kis garment part ka basic pattern hai?

options.B: Trousers

questions.explanation: Bodice block upper body garment (jaise blouse, top) ke liye ek basic, fitted pattern hota hai, jisse further styles develop kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Pattern making mein 'grainline' symbol ka kya importance hai?

options.A: Fabric ko kahin bhi cut karne ke liye
options.B: Pattern piece ko fabric par warp grain ke parallel align karna

questions.explanation: Grainline symbol (ek straight line with arrows) pattern piece ko fabric par sahi direction mein place karne ke liye use hota hai, usually warp grain ke parallel, jo garment ki drape aur fit ko affect karta hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa tool fabric ko smoothly aur precisely cut karne ke liye use hota hai?

options.B: Fabric shears

questions.explanation: Fabric shears specially designed hote hain fabric ko clean aur precise cuts dene ke liye. Unhe sirf fabric cutting ke liye use karna chahiye.

questions.question: 'Ease' ka kya matlab hai pattern making mein?

options.B: Body measurement se extra space jo movement aur comfort ke liye add kiya jata hai

questions.explanation: Ease woh additional measurement hai jo body measurement mein add kiya jata hai taaki garment mein movement, comfort aur style ke liye enough room ho.

questions.question: Measuring tape ka primary use kya hai pattern making mein?

options.B: Body measurements lena aur patterns par measurements mark karna

questions.explanation: Measuring tape body measurements lene aur patterns par precise measurements mark karne ke liye ek essential tool hai.

questions.question: Pattern making mein 'notches' ka kya function hai?

options.B: Pattern pieces ko accurately align aur join karne ke liye marking points

questions.explanation: Notches small cuts ya markings hote hain pattern pieces par jo seamstress ko guide karte hain ki kaun se parts ko ek saath align aur stitch karna hai.

questions.question: Ek basic 'skirt block' banane ke liye kaun se body measurements zaroori hain?

options.B: Waist, hip, skirt length

questions.explanation: Skirt block banane ke liye waist circumference, hip circumference, aur desired skirt length jaise measurements essential hote hain.

questions.question: Pattern making mein 'sloper' ya 'block' kya hota hai?

options.B: Ek basic, fitted, custom-made pattern jise further designs develop karne ke liye use kiya jata hai

questions.explanation: Sloper (ya block) ek basic, custom-fitted pattern hota hai jismein koi style details ya seam allowance nahi hota. Yeh ek foundation pattern hai jisse naye designs develop kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Pattern ko fabric par place karte samay 'on fold' symbol ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Pattern ko fabric ke edge par place karna
options.B: Pattern ko fabric ke folded edge par align karna, jisse cut karne par ek symmetrical piece mile
options.C: Pattern ko diagonal par place karna
options.D: Pattern ko do layers mein cut karna

questions.explanation: 'On fold' symbol ka matlab hai ki pattern piece ko fabric ke folded edge par rakha jayega, jisse jab fabric open hoga toh ek full, symmetrical piece banega, jaise ki dress front ya back.

questions.question: Kaun sa tool curved lines aur shapes ko draw karne ke liye use hota hai?

options.B: L-square ruler

questions.explanation: French curve ek curved ruler hai jo armholes, necklines, aur hip curves jaise smooth, curved lines draw karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Pattern making mein 'truing' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Pattern pieces ki seams ko smooth aur accurate banana, jisse woh neatly align hon
options.D: Pattern ko fabric par pin karna

questions.explanation: Truing ek process hai jismein pattern pieces ki seam lines ko check aur adjust kiya jata hai taaki woh smooth hon aur jab stitch hon toh perfectly align hon, especially at corners aur curves.

questions.question: Pattern drafting mein 'slash and spread' method ka kya use hai?

options.B: Pattern mein fullness (jaise gathers, pleats) add karna ya dart ko relocate karna

questions.explanation: Slash and spread ek common pattern manipulation technique hai jismein pattern ko cut kiya jata hai aur phir spread karke fullness add ki jaati hai, ya dart ko relocate kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Ek pattern piece par 'place on fold' mark kyun important hai?

options.A: Garment ko asymmetrical banane ke liye
options.B: Fabric waste kam karne ke liye
options.C: Garment ke center front ya back ko seamless banane ke liye
options.D: Pattern ko chhota dikhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Place on fold mark ensures that when the fabric is cut and unfolded, it creates a symmetrical piece without a seam at the center front or back, which is crucial for many garment styles.

questions.question: Pattern making mein 'muslin fitting' ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Original fabric cut karne se pehle pattern ki fit aur style ko test aur adjust karna

questions.explanation: Muslin fitting (ya toile fitting) mein ek inexpensive fabric (muslin ya calico) se garment ka prototype banaya jata hai taaki pattern ki fit, balance aur style ko check aur adjust kiya ja sake, costly fabric waste hone se bachaya ja sake.

questions.question: Pattern ko fabric par pin karte samay, pins kaise lagane chahiye?

options.B: Pattern edges ke perpendicular, aur fabric grain ke parallel
options.D: Jitne zyada ho sake, utne pins

questions.explanation: Pins ko pattern edges ke perpendicular lagana chahiye taaki pattern securely hold ho aur fabric ko distort na kare. Grainline ke parallel bhi pins lagaye jaate hain taaki pattern fabric par flat rahe.

questions.question: Fashion industry mein 'Merchandiser' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Collection planning, buying, aur sales strategy manage karna

questions.explanation: Fashion merchandiser market trends ko analyze karke collection planning, product development, pricing, aur sales strategy ko manage karta hai.

questions.question: Ek fashion designer ke liye 'portfolio' kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Apne family ko dikhane ke liye
options.B: Apne best work, skills aur design aesthetic ko potential employers ya clients ko showcase karne ke liye
options.C: Sirf school projects store karne ke liye
options.D: Apni shopping list rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Portfolio ek visual resume hai jo designer ke skills, creativity, design process aur best work samples ko display karta hai, jo job applications aur client meetings ke liye critical hai.

questions.question: 'Fast Fashion' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Latest trends ko quickly aur cheaply mass-produce karke consumers tak pahunchana

questions.explanation: Fast fashion ek business model hai jo latest runway trends ko quickly reproduce karke affordable prices par retailers tak pahunchata hai, often at the cost of environmental aur labor ethics.

questions.question: Fashion industry mein 'sustainability' ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Environmental aur social impact ko minimize karte hue fashion products create karna

questions.explanation: Sustainability ka matlab hai fashion practices ko adopt karna jo environmental degradation ko kam kare, fair labor practices ensure kare, aur resources ka responsible use kare.

questions.question: Ek fashion designer ke liye 'networking' kyun important hai?

options.B: Industry contacts banane, opportunities explore karne aur knowledge gain karne ke liye
options.C: Apne designs ko copy karwane ke liye

questions.explanation: Networking se designers ko valuable industry contacts milte hain, jo mentorship, job opportunities, collaborations, aur market insights provide kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Fashion marketing mein 'brand identity' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Brand ki unique personality, values aur visual elements jo use competitors se alag karte hain

questions.explanation: Brand identity ek cohesive set of elements (logo, color scheme, typography, brand voice) hai jo ek fashion brand ki personality aur values ko define aur communicate karta hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa career path ek fashion designer ke liye available hai jo sirf technical drawings aur garment specifications par focus karta hai?

options.B: Technical Designer

questions.explanation: Technical Designer ka role garment construction, fit, fabric selection, aur production specifications par focus karta hai, jismein technical flats aur spec sheets banana shamil hai.

questions.question: Freelance fashion designer banne ka ek main benefit kya hai?

options.B: Apne projects aur schedule par control
options.D: Sirf ek hi client ke saath kaam karna

questions.explanation: Freelance designer apne projects, clients, aur working hours ko control kar sakte hain, jisse flexibility milti hai, lekin ismein self-discipline aur business acumen ki zaroorat hoti hai.

questions.question: Fashion business mein 'supply chain' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Raw material se lekar finished product tak ka poora production aur distribution process

questions.explanation: Supply chain mein raw material sourcing, manufacturing, logistics, distribution, aur retailing jaise saare steps shamil hote hain, jo ek product ko consumer tak pahunchate hain.

questions.question: Ek fashion designer ko 'intellectual property rights' (IPR) ke baare mein kyun pata hona chahiye?

options.A: Sirf legal fees dene ke liye
options.B: Apne original designs ko copy hone se bachane aur unhe protect karne ke liye
options.C: Dusre designers ke designs copy karne ke liye
options.D: Market mein competition badhane ke liye

questions.explanation: IPR (jaise copyright, trademark, design registration) designers ko apne original creative works ko unauthorized copying aur misuse se protect karne mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Fashion retail mein 'visual merchandising' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Store displays aur layout ko design karna taaki customers ko attract kiya ja sake aur sales boost ho

questions.explanation: Visual merchandising store ke aesthetic appeal aur product presentation ko optimize karta hai taaki customers ko engage kiya ja sake aur buying experience enhance ho.

questions.question: Fashion designer ke liye 'trend forecasting' kyun important hai?

options.A: Sirf past styles dekhne ke liye
options.B: Future fashion trends ko predict karna taaki relevant aur marketable collections banaye ja saken
options.C: Sirf basic designs repeat karne ke liye
options.D: Apne competitors ko ignore karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Trend forecasting designers ko upcoming colors, fabrics, silhouettes, aur styles ke baare mein insight deta hai, jisse woh apne collections ko market demand ke according plan kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Ek fashion brand ke liye 'online presence' kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf friends ko dikhane ke liye
options.B: Global audience tak pahunchne, visibility badhane aur e-commerce ke through sales generate karne ke liye
options.C: Physical stores ko band karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Digital platforms jaise websites, social media, aur e-commerce stores brands ko wider audience tak pahunchne, engagement badhane aur sales drive karne mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Kaun sa role garment production process mein quality control aur fit ensure karta hai?

options.B: Pattern Grader

questions.explanation: Quality Assurance Manager ka role garment production ke har stage par quality standards ko monitor karna, defects ko identify karna, aur final product ki quality aur fit ensure karna hai.

questions.question: Ek fashion designer ke liye 'costing' ki basic knowledge kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Apne kapdon ko free mein dene ke liye
options.B: Product ki profitability determine karne aur pricing strategy banane ke liye
options.C: Sirf fashion shows organize karne ke liye
options.D: Fabric ko waste karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Costing ki knowledge designers ko raw material, labor, manufacturing, aur overhead costs ko calculate karne mein help karti hai, jisse woh apne products ki profitability ensure kar sakte hain aur competitive prices set kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Fashion industry mein 'ethical sourcing' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Materials ko aise source karna jismein fair labor practices aur minimal environmental impact ho
options.C: Fabric ko kisi bhi tarah se source karna

questions.explanation: Ethical sourcing ka matlab hai ki raw materials aur products ko aise suppliers se kharidna jo environmental responsibility, fair wages, safe working conditions, aur no child labor jaise ethical standards ko follow karte hain.
